items.title: Bangkok fire investigation finds locked doors and flammable decor as deaths climb to 30
items.summary: Survivors and first responders reported locked doors and a lack of signage marking emergency exits.

items.title: Australian police reveal unseen photos 25 years after British backpacker murder
items.summary: Police hope the images could jog memories that will help them find the body of Peter Falconio.

items.title: Hungary parliament votes to remove president from office
items.summary: Tamás Sulyok was widely seen as a loyalist of former prime minister Viktor Orbán, who lost power in April after 16 years.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 危邦不留！中國政治和經濟風險變多 日本中小企業加速撤離
items.summary: 由於美中關係和日中關係持續緊張，中國經濟成長放緩，加上北京當局推出「反間諜法」等惡法的情況下，越來越多日本中小企業已撤資離開中國。 　香港《新城電台》引述日媒報導，總部位於東...…
